info.title: Cxset
info.description: A .NET CLI tool for managing versions and changelogs across multiple projects in a repository.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Manage versions and changelogs for .NET projects

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Display a summary table of all discovered projects

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publish all pending changesets and bump version

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate that packable projects have a Version element
